name: New Horizons
description_short: New Horizons Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with competitive rates and digital banking services.
description_long: New Horizons Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving consumers seeking an alternative to traditional banks. The organization provides comprehensive retail financial services including deposit accounts, lending products, and payment solutions through both physical locations and digital channels. Their product lineup spans membership accounts (checking and savings), investment products (IRAs, HSAs, CDs, money market accounts), and various loan types including auto, mortgage, home equity, student, and personal loans, along with a VISA credit card offering. The credit union differentiates itself through membership-based access, competitive lending rates marketed as "the lowest available," and innovative products like their Rising CD promotion that increases rates when the Federal Reserve raises rates. Members benefit from online and mobile banking capabilities, mobile deposit capture, bill pay, and a mobile wallet feature. The institution maintains a physical presence with multiple locations and provides educational resources through their Financial Wellness Center covering topics like credit scores and identity theft protection. New Horizons emphasizes community accessibility with a local phone line (513-562-6600) and positioning around "Your Financial Success Begins Here." As a credit union, the organization is governed by member interests rather than shareholder profits, which typically translates to lower fees and rates favorable to members. However, the website content provided is limited (a demo version from the Wayback Machine), restricting visibility into complete product details, membership eligibility requirements, fee structures, and specific rate information beyond one promotional offering.
services: Certificates of Deposit with Rising CD promotion
Auto loans with Auto Buying Center
Mobile App with Mobile Deposit Capture
pros: Rising CD promotion automatically increases rates when Federal Reserve raises rates, with a floor guarantee preventing rate decreases
Competitive auto loan rates explicitly marketed as "the lowest lending rates available on new and used vehicles"
Comprehensive digital banking including online bill pay, mobile deposit capture, and mobile wallet functionality
Member-owned cooperative structure typically results in lower fees and rates compared to for-profit banks
Diverse loan portfolio including auto, mortgage, home equity, student, and personal loans in addition to credit cards
Educational resources through Financial Wellness Center covering credit scores, identity theft, and financial planning
Local accessibility with phone support (513-562-6600) and multiple physical branch locations
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly detailed on available website content, potentially restricting access
Limited fee and rate transparency on the demo website; specific APRs for most products not disclosed
Auto Buying Center and Business Checking mentioned but no detailed information provided on these offerings
Website content is incomplete (Wayback Machine demo version), lacking full service details and account specifications
No information available regarding minimum deposits, account maintenance fees, or early withdrawal penalties
best_for: Local Ohio/Cincinnati-area residents seeking membership-based banking with competitive rates
Auto loan shoppers prioritizing low lending rates on vehicle financing
Homebuyers and refinancing customers looking for mortgage services from a member-focused institution
Consumers interested in CD products with Federal Reserve rate escalation features
diagnosis: New Horizons Credit Union is best suited for credit union members in the Cincinnati/Ohio region seeking membership-based banking with competitive loan rates and comprehensive digital services. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility requirements and detailed fee/rate structures are not transparent on the available website content, requiring direct contact to confirm eligibility and compare specific product terms.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: New Horizons — NCUA-insured credit union in MOBILE, AL. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
